sch.text: [{"template":"two_column","title":"Datacentre to Azure Migration Executive Summary: Lower Cost, Higher Agility","left_content":"Move core banking workloads from legacy datacentres to Azure in phased waves to reduce infrastructure run-costs, improve delivery speed, and create a more elastic platform for future digital growth. The program standardizes landing zones, network segmentation, identity, and governance so teams can migrate safely while maintaining operational control.","right_cards":[{"value":"20-35%","label":"Potential infrastructure run-cost reduction after steady state optimization","accent":"green"},{"value":"3-5x","label":"Faster provisioning for new environments and workloads","accent":"blue"},{"value":"Phased","label":"Wave-based migration lowers execution risk and preserves business continuity","accent":"teal"}]},{"template":"two_column","title":"Resilience: Stronger Recovery, Better Availability, Less Single-Point Risk","left_content":"Azure enables a more resilient operating model by distributing workloads across availability zones and regions, replacing dependency on a single datacentre with tested failover patterns. Recovery objectives improve through automated backup, orchestration, and repeatable disaster recovery runbooks aligned to critical banking services.","right_cards":[{"value":"99.9%+","label":"Target availability for key platform services with zone-aware design","accent":"blue"},{"value":"Minutes","label":"Recovery time improvement through automated failover and scripted recovery","accent":"green"},{"value":"Dual-region","label":"Design pattern for business-critical services and disaster recovery","accent":"teal"}]},{"template":"two_column","title":"Security: Centralized Controls, Stronger Identity, and Better Auditability","left_content":"The migration strengthens security by moving to centralized identity, least-privilege access, encryption by default, and continuous monitoring across the cloud estate. Azure policy, logging, and threat detection improve audit readiness while helping standardize controls across applications, networks, and data.","right_cards":[{"value":"Zero Trust","label":"Security model built around identity, device, workload, and network controls","accent":"amber"},{"value":"24/7","label":"Continuous monitoring and alerting for threats, misconfigurations, and anomalies","accent":"blue"},{"value":"Unified","label":"Governance and audit evidence across migrated environments","accent":"green"}]}]
